meaning: v.到处翻寻,搜出,检查n.翻箱倒柜的寻找,检查,零星杂物
examples: They rummage through piles of secondhand clothes for something that fits.
A brief rummage will provide several pairs of gloves.
Have a rummage around in the drawer and see if you can find a pen.
And while the shelves are pristine in the showroom, they won't be once kids rummage around.
We no longer had to rummage through the TV listings and stay up until 3 A.M.
